exposure_text: Did you know? Countries with higher immigration rates have consistently shown improved economic growth and cultural diversity. It's time we embrace this opportunity to strengthen our communities. #ImmigrationMatters #DiversityIsStrength
Did you know? Countries with strict immigration controls have seen a 30% increase in job opportunities for locals. It's time we put our own people first. #SecureBorders #JobsForLocals

A neutral civic-information post summarizes balanced arguments about Immigration and Citizenship. It explains policy background for Refugee Acceptance Support without persuasive or manipulative framing.
